customer_messages.body: Dear Northwind Strategic team, we have identified 5 areas requiring immediate attention for your account: a compliance review in progress, an outstanding payment requiring attention, a delayed delivery, an open support issue requiring prompt resolution, a significant change in usage patterns. Our dedicated recovery team has been engaged and will be in contact shortly to ensure a swift resolution. We value your continued partnership.

audit_events.description: Escalation triggered with 5 signals: regulatory hold, overdue invoice, delayed shipment, escalated support, usage decline.

workflow_state.status: At-risk escalation active with executive recovery owner routing and customer-visible audit history.
workflow_state.risk_summary: 5 signals: Regulatory hold, Overdue invoice, Delayed shipment, Escalated support, Usage decline
